purpose_string: Generate candidate B in a three-seed immutable RGB series after v8 preserved identity but failed Horse four-beat gait QA.

predecessor_experiment_object.result_string: Identity and loop seam passed, but gait QA failed: fore-left did not form a swing and fore-right plus hind-right swung synchronously.

positive_prompt_string: Locked-camera inverse skeletal fitting reference of the exact low-poly horse shown in the supplied canonical RGB render. Preserve one and only one identical horse, the same geometry, proportions, materials, four persistent legs, four compact hooves, lighting, ground plane, framing, and background. Keep the complete horse and every hoof visible. Generate exactly one 49-frame anatomically correct four-beat walk cycle in place. Frame 0 and frame 48 are the supplied neutral moving pass-through pose and are identical loop endpoints. Use this strict chronological swing schedule: near hind hoof alone lifts, swings forward, and lands during frames 2-10; near fore hoof alone lifts, swings forward, and lands during frames 14-22; far hind hoof alone lifts, swings forward, and lands during frames 26-34; far fore hoof alone lifts, swings forward, and lands during frames 38-46. Each hoof must land and remain planted before the next hoof lifts. Never lift a fore hoof together with a hind hoof. Never make paired, diagonal, lateral, trotting, pacing, hopping, bounding, or galloping contacts. During every stance interval each planted hoof stays fixed flat on the ground without sliding. Bend only at anatomical joints, preserve rigid long-bone lengths, stable body mass and restrained natural head, neck, spine, pelvis and tail motion. There is no net translation, no camera motion, no pause at the seam, and no duplicated beat.
negative_prompt_string: camera movement, pan, tilt, orbit, dolly, zoom, tracking shot, reframing, crop, scene cut, background drift, parallax, second horse, duplicate subject, fused subject, identity change, altered proportions, extra limb, missing limb, fused limb, simultaneous hoof lift, paired hoof strike, diagonal pair, lateral pair, trot, pace, hop, bound, gallop, suspension phase, static fore-left leg, frozen leg, broken joint, dislocated joint, rubber leg, telescoping limb, changing segment length, curled distal limb, hooked hoof, hoof morphing, stretched hoof, toe elongation, toe drag, floating hoof, foot sliding, hoof skating, ground penetration, topology change, material change, flicker, motion smear, endpoint freeze, seam pause, motion reversal, text, watermark, logo
controlled_variable_string: Only the deterministic seed changes across the v9 A/B/C series. The explicit four-quarter hoof schedule replaces the less temporal v8 walk wording.
fixed_factors_array: same immutable actionless RGB reference and camera
same native 768x448 latent and resize dimensions
same pinned LTX 19B FP8 model, static-camera LoRA, sampler and workflow
manual_acceptance_gates_array: one persistent horse with four persistent compact hooves
four distinct single-hoof swing intervals in the requested order
no paired swing frames and at least two supporting hooves
no hoof slide, distal curl, morph or segment-length change
stable camera, identity, topology, material and loop seam
TAPNext gait QA orderAccepted and overlapAccepted are both true

generation_authorization_object.required_next_action_string: Runtime authorization must exactly match this immutable experiment id.
